notes: UTSUSHI-228 alpha closer. Single (modelId, providerId) pair pinned for every stage of the agentic loop. The enUsSentinel substring is woven into the translation prompt so the patched Seen.txt's replay produces a TextLine whose bodyUtf8 contains the substring verbatim. ASCII-only by deliberate choice: the leading SJIS bracket required by the KAIFUU-191 lexer is wrapped around the sentinel by the patch step, not by the prompt. See UTSUSHI-227 for the sentinel-validation contract. The discriminator '228' lives ONLY in this policyId; the sentinel never embeds digits because lexer leads 0-4 collide with SELECTION_OPTION_MARKER under UTSUSHI-204.
